content_body: Our stay was wonderful! We liked the cabin and the friendly area. Most importantly we enjoyed the Mayfly cabin and all it had to offer us. We found Cabin Rentals of Georgia to be an excellent place to rent a luxury high end cabin with all the amenities of a 5 star hotel. Thank you Cabin Rentals of Georgia - we will be back, we appreciate your service and your attention to details.
title: 5 Star Experience!
